Name: Minimum time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants with a single revision cycle
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Minimum waiting time to the SW-Awaiting EIC Decision after SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Percentage of total case time spent in SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time until SW-Awaiting EIC Decision from manuscript submission
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision since the SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: SW-Awaiting EIC Decision Cycle Time
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Ratio of time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to time for SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Difference between average time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and average time for SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Ratio of time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to total time for all reviewer selection and invitation activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Difference between time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in major revision cases and time in minor revision cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision occurs

Name: Time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision compared to the time for the entire initial review cycle (from submission to first decision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants involving 'Assign a Different Editor' or 'Unassign Editor'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'Assign a Different Editor occurs

Name: Average time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants with 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder' events
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 occurs

Name: Time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in the scientific paper review process relative to the time for 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Impact of 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' timing on the duration of the subsequent SW-Awaiting EIC Decision phase
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision when preceded by multiple 'SW-Reviewer Declined' activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined occurs

Name: Time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in challenge paper review variants versus standard review variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper occurs

Name: Stability of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision duration across different process variants (standard deviation of time)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case
